info.title: Service for namespace SFODataSet
info.description:
This service is located at [https://services.OData.org/service-root/](https://services.OData.org/service-root/)

## Entity Data Model
![ER Diagram](https://yuml.me/diagram/class/[User{bg:dodgerblue}]++-*>[User],[UserPermissions{bg:dodgerblue}]++-*>[UserPermissions],[getUserNameFormat{bg:dodgerblue}],[getPasswordPolicy{bg:dodgerblue}],[User{bg:orange}],[User]-*>[User{bg:orange}],[User]-*>[User{bg:orange}],[User]-*>[User{bg:orange}],[User]-0..1>[User{bg:orange}],[User]-*>[User{bg:orange}],[User]-0..1>[User{bg:orange}],[User]-*>[User{bg:orange}],[User]-*>[User{bg:orange}],[User]-*>[User{bg:orange}],[User]-0..1>[User{bg:orange}],[User]-*>[User{bg:orange}],[User]->[UserPermissions{bg:orange}],[UserPermissions{bg:orange}])

parameters.name: locale
parameters.description: Value needs to be enclosed in single quotes

parameters.name: $format

get.description: The function import is used to get password policy

parameters.name: locale
parameters.description: Value needs to be enclosed in single quotes

parameters.name: $format
parameters.description: The format of the response. Supported values: json, xml

post.description:
Group multiple requests into a single request payload, see [Batch Requests](https://help.sap.com/doc/5890d27be418427993fafa6722cdc03b/Cloud/en-US/OdataV2.pdf#page=152).

*Please note that "Try it out" is not supported for this request.*

multipart/mixed;boundary=request-separat.example:
--request-separator
Content-Type: application/http
Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary

GET User HTTP/1.1
Accept: application/json


--request-separator--

multipart/mixed.example:
--response-separator
Content-Type: application/http

HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Content-Type: application/json

{...}
--response-separator--

parameters.name: If-Match
parameters.description: ETag value
parameters.x-ms-summary: Place the eTag value for optimistic concurrency control in this header

head.summary: The root of the API, needed for any csrf processing

200.description: The root of the API, needed for any csrf processing

count.description: The number of entities in the collection. Available when using the [$inlinecount](https://help.sap.com/doc/5890d27be418427993fafa6722cdc03b/Cloud/en-US/OdataV2.pdf#page=67) query option.

innererror.description: The structure of this object is service-specific

top.name: $top
top.description: Show only the first n items, see [Paging - Top](https://help.sap.com/doc/5890d27be418427993fafa6722cdc03b/Cloud/en-US/OdataV2.pdf#page=66)

skip.name: $skip
skip.description: Skip the first n items, see [Paging - Skip](https://help.sap.com/doc/5890d27be418427993fafa6722cdc03b/Cloud/en-US/OdataV2.pdf#page=65)
